case_title: JAYESH N. PATEL VS. CATONO R. PEREZ

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT PEREZ, CATONO R. ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, JAYESH N. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEREZ, CATONO R. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 905 COLUMBUS AVENUE, #241, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94133-2309, FOR POSSESSION ONLY PURSUANT TO STIPULATION.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, JAYESH N. AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, CATONO R. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT CATONO PEREZ' MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PAUL H. ALVARADO, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR # 5759

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Gerard Mendez, Esq., for plaintiff Jayesh N. Patel, who is also present. C. Danny Wang, Esq., limited scope attorney for defendant Catono R. Perez, who is also present.

Settlement Conference Held. Unlawful Detainer Stipulation for Entry of Judgment/Dismissal for property located at 905 Columbus Avenue #241, San Francisco, California, filed. See scanned document. Trial date vacated.
